g.text: Introduction & Executive Summary
802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
IDENTIFICATION OF
ASSIGNMENT
Property Identification
The subject property, located at 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, AB, is a multi-family, walkup property with
improvements located in the Drumheller.
The improvements are comprised of 1 building, and consist of 18,117 square feet of net rentable area (NRA) as of
the valuation date. The property, reportedly built in 1981 and is to be renovated in the next 12 months, is
approximately 91.7% occupied and features 24 units in a 3-story, garden style format.
Legal Description
Condo Plan 9711306, Unit 1 - 24
Authorized Client Identification
The authorized client of this speciﬁc assignment is 2766129 Alberta Ltd. and Calco Realty Holdings Inc.
Authorized Use & Authorized Users
The authorized use of this report is for first mortgage financing purposes. Calco Realty Holdings Inc. is the only
authorized user of this report.
Effective Date of Value and Report Date
The effective date of value of this appraisal is November 28, 2025. The report date is December 12, 2025.
Inspection Date
November 28, 2025 and January 25, 2022
Purpose
The purpose of this assignment is to provide the As Is and As If Renovated & Stabilized current market value of the
property located at 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, AB which at the time of inspection represents the improved
property as of the effective date (herein referred to as the ‘subject property’).
Hypothetical Conditions
The use of a hypothetical condition(s) may have impacted the results of the assignment. The As If Renovated &
Stabilized market value concluded herein has been developed under the hypothetical condition that the existing
improvements, as described in this report, have been fully renovated and have been leased at market rents with
stabilized occupancy as of the effective date. In reality, the renovations are not complete as of the effective date.
This appraisal does not consider unforeseeable events that could affect the timing, cost, or outcome of the
renovation and lease-up process. If the stated hypothetical condition does not hold true, the value conclusion
presented herein may be materially affected.
